body_txt: Start by tilting your body, low to the ground. Take short but fast steps. Crook one forarm in front of your body, apparently to block attacks (two fingers held in front of the mouth optional but prevalent). And put the other arm behind the back, either crooked or stretched out and high, ready to pull out a bladed weapon (alternatively, both arms can be kept back in this fashion). Now you can feel like a ninja ! The Ninja Run is a go-to for Japanese settings , where characters that practice ninjutsu will typically run this way. That said, it isn't exclusive to "ninja" characters, as other characters can pick the tic up, too. If the character carries a weapon while running like this, it is always held in a Reverse Grip . Compare and contrast with Airplane Arms .
